TS2339.description: Property does not exist on type

TS2345.description: Argument type not assignable to parameter

P0_trust_boundary_blocking.description: Plugin capability, MCP auth, EventStore, tool registry, HTTP API claims — authority surfaces where type errors can enable capability bypass or runtime ambiguity

P1_test_blockers.description: Errors that prevent running key proof suites: campaign lifecycle, tool pipeline, plugin/MCP lifecycle

P2_stale_api_drift.description: Renamed exports, changed function shapes, Effect API version drift, EventName type narrowing

P3_legacy_dead_surfaces.description: Legacy test fixtures referencing removed modules (tui-control, capability/map), deprecated plugin APIs

P4_cosmetic_inference.description: Strictness annoyances not blocking proof or trust boundaries

capability_import_bug.claim: CapabilityId import bug in plugin module still blocks tool-define.test.ts
capability_import_bug.details: test/plugin/capability-proxy-bisect.test.ts imports makeScopedClient, makeScopedShell, makeScopedFetch, makeFilteredEnv from ../../src/plugin/capability/index but these exports do not exist on the module (24 TS2339 errors). Also cannot find module ../../src/plugin/capability/map (2 TS2307 errors).

registry_buildGraph.verified: UNKNOWN — test/tool/registry.test.ts still has TS2554 error at line 72 (expected 0-20 args, got 21) and TS2339 'pipe' does not exist on type 'never' at line 74. The registry.ts file itself is not in the error list, suggesting the fix may have been applied but the test hasn't been updated.

mcp_auth_yield_bug.verified: UNKNOWN — mcp/auth.ts does not appear in error list. Only error in mcp/ is index.ts:915 (comparison overlap). The fix may have been applied successfully.

campaign_lifecycle_session.note: First concurrent session owns campaign lifecycle. Campaign files (auditor.ts, binder.ts, projector.ts, integrator.ts, truth-closure.test.ts) have errors but fixes should not change runtime behavior.
campaign_lifecycle_session.allowed: Fix import/type errors only — do not change behavior. May need to coordinate if EventName union needs updating.

recommended_fix_order.approach: Fix plugin capability export surface. Either restore missing exports or update test to use current API.
Fix EventName string vs union type, Schema annotations, Effect type mismatches at event store boundary.
Fix Effect API version drift — wrong argument counts to Effect combinators.
Fix EventName comparisons, redeclared export. Coordinate with campaign lifecycle session.
Fix test compilation: missing namespace, removed module references, arg count mismatches.
